extortion.description: Texollini is a textile manufacturer that combines fashion and technology to create innovative materials and advanced performance textiles. They offer a wide range of products including activewear, athleisure wear, swimwear, and intimate apparel, catering to various markets. We will upload 20gb of corporate data soon. Employee passports and DLs, medical records, HR forms, financial files, a bit of client files, contracts and agreements, NDAs, etc.
